globalNews.title: Hezbollah rejects renewed ceasefire agreed by Israel and Lebanon
globalNews.summary: The United States announced the ceasefire agreement on Wednesday night following a fresh round of talks.

globalNews.title: Trump hits back at 'unpatriotic' vote after House rebukes him over Iran
globalNews.summary: The lower chamber of Congress passed a measure that seeks to halt further military action, in a vote seen as largely symbolic.

globalNews.title: 'Crazy' phone call between Trump and Netanyahu complicates Iran talks
globalNews.summary: Israel's PM laughed off reports of friction, but he has tested the patience of other US presidents.

globalNews.title: Israeli strikes kill 11 people in Gaza City, medics say
globalNews.summary: Women and children were among those killed when Israeli aircraft struck at least four residential buildings in several areas.

globalNews.title: Missing Sherpa guide found on Mount Everest after 'miracle' self-rescue
globalNews.summary: Cleaners found Dawa Sherpa crawling towards Base Camp six days after he went missing at a higher altitude.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Saylor downplays Bitcoin slide as Strategy faces $11B paper loss
cryptoNews.summary: Strategy’s Bitcoin paper loss tops $11 billion as Saylor pointed to ETF outflows and AI infrastructure spending as factors pressuring BTC.

cryptoNews.title: Apex, Archax join Goldman Sachs tokenized real estate fund project
cryptoNews.summary: Apex Group is providing fund services for a tokenized real estate fund using Goldman Sachs’ GS DAP platform.

cryptoNews.title: Arthur Hayes dumps HYPE, NEAR as he warns of AI IPO wave
cryptoNews.summary: Arthur Hayes said he dumped his HYPE and NEAR holdings after warning markets may peak before September and AI IPOs could drain liquidity.

cryptoNews.title: Coinbase launches pre-IPO markets, starting with Elon Musk’s SpaceX
cryptoNews.summary: Coinbase launches pre-IPO markets starting with SpaceX, offering non-US users perpetual futures tied to private company valuations amid rising competition.

aiNews.title: Is Silicon Valley ready to put robots in people’s homes? Hello Robot is.
aiNews.summary: The California startup released the fourth-generation of its home assistance robot, Stretch.

aiNews.title: Apple touts $1.4 trillion in App Store billings and sales, 90% without a commission
aiNews.summary: Apple's App Store generated $1.4 trillion in sales, up from $1.3 trillion last year, with $149 billion in sales for digital goods.

aiNews.title: Lovable signs multiyear deal with Google Cloud to up usage 5x, source says
aiNews.summary: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multiyear deal that involves a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud, and expanded access to Anthropic Claude.

aiNews.title: Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal
aiNews.summary: If Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals investor appetite for AI-related offerings, we can see that investors are ready to chow.

aiNews.title: Google’s Dreambeans, its weirdest-named AI tool to date, will turn your life into a cartoon
aiNews.summary: Dreambeans is a curated list of AI-illustrated "stories" culled from the personal data in your Google account.
